brand.name: CKP TÉTOUAN — Centre de Kinésithérapie Iman El Jemaati
brand.archetype: Cinematic Organic Luxury (Archetype 1 Base + Archetype 5 Lighting)
brand.tone: Modern medical luxury, calming confidence, human warmth, elite rehabilitation

colors.guidelines: Use Ivory White and Warm Sand for section backgrounds. Deep Charcoal for main typography (never pure black). Teal Sarcelle (#2BA89E) must be the primary action color (buttons, active states, highlights). Subtle Gold and Eucalyptus are used for decorative elements and borders.

rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-tight
rules.h2: text-3xl md:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-serif tracking-tight leading-snug
rules.overline: text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-sans font-medium text-teal_sarcelle
rules.decorative_arabic: Used subtly in backgrounds or low-opacity watermarks to honor roots, but all core text must be French.

solid.card: bg-white rounded-3xl border border-warm_sand shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

textures.grain_overlay: pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 opacity-[0.03] mix-blend-multiply bg-[url('https://static.prod-images.emergentagent.com/jobs/ab8538c5-1504-46c7-af1f-eb745ac442fe/images/011f8df8efde76fbf061d6a27da6a75650d11910ff469a369379865dad770f8b.png')] z-50

sections.name: Navigation
sections.layout: Floating transparent navbar with glassmorphism on scroll.
sections.components: Logo, Links (À propos, Services, Témoignages), Sticky 'Prendre rendez-vous' button in Teal Sarcelle.

sections.name: Hero Cinematic
sections.layout: Full height (min-h-screen). Image background with soft warm overlay (bg-warm_sand/20 to bg-black/10). Parallax effect.
sections.components: H1 Title centered or left-aligned. Floating glass CTA card at the bottom right or center with 'Prendre Rendez-vous' pointing to WhatsApp.

sections.name: Trusted Expertise Strip
sections.layout: Horizontal strip overlapping the hero bottom or directly below. bg-white or glassmorphism.
sections.components: 3-4 animated counters (e.g., '10+ Ans Expérience', '1000+ Patients', 'Méthodes Innovantes').

sections.name: About Iman El Jemaati
sections.components: Left: Large curved or arched portrait image. Right: Typography-rich bio, overline 'NOTRE FONDATRICE', soft signature script accent.

sections.name: Services Grid
sections.layout: Bento grid or horizontal scroll. 6 cards: Kinésithérapie, Massage thérapeutique, Rééducation sportive, Traitement lombaire, Rééducation posturale, Drainage & relaxation.
sections.components: Cards use large imagery, dark gradient overlays, and reveal text/Teal overlay on hover.

sections.name: Interactive Human Motion
sections.layout: Dark or rich Teal backdrop to contrast with the light theme, serving as a visual palette cleanser.
sections.components: Center the 3D 'human_motion_silhouette' image. Use framer-motion to create absolute positioned pulsing 'hotspots' (Teal/Gold) over body parts. Hovering a hotspot reveals a tooltip/glass-card with specific therapies.

sections.name: Before/After Storytelling
sections.layout: Clean, spacious section with overlapping textual timeline or side-by-side subtle visual journey.
sections.components: Focus on textual recovery paths, using elegant typography and soft line separators.

sections.name: Luxury Wellness Experience
sections.layout: Full-width parallax or fixed background section using the 'wellness_experience' image.
sections.components: Large evocative typography over the image. Minimalist 'Apple-style' text.

sections.name: Testimonials
sections.layout: Carousel or staggered masonry layout. py-24 bg-champagne_beige.
sections.components: Glass cards containing Avatars, 5-star ratings (Teal or Gold), and patient quotes.

sections.name: Appointment Booking (WhatsApp CTA)
sections.layout: Centralized, high-impact CTA section. bg-teal_sarcelle text-white rounded-3xl mx-4 md:mx-12 my-20 p-16.
sections.components: Large Headline, WhatsApp icon button with hover scale.

sections.name: Cinematic Footer
sections.components: Brand logo, Contact details (286 N° 2, Av. Hassan II, Tetouan 93000, Maroc. Tel: 06 11 99 21 24), subtle Arabic calligraphic watermark pattern.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling is highly recommended for fluidity.
motion_and_interactions.reveal: Framer Motion: fade-up and blur-to-focus on scroll (initial={{ opacity: 0, filter: 'blur(10px)', y: 30 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, filter: 'blur(0px)', y: 0 }}).
motion_and_interactions.hover: Services cards scale image by 1.05, text translates up. Buttons translate Y by -2px with increased shadow.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, links, hotspots, carousel arrows) MUST include data-testid. Example: data-testid='whatsapp-cta-button'.
